Introduction
    Follows Oliver Horn as he enters a prestigious magic school named Kimberly. He discovers that not everything is as it seems, with the emergence of labyrinths, monsters, and other threats that endanger the students.

Also known as: Thất Kiếm Ma Thuật Thống Trị Thế Giới
